title: centaurea × druentica
intro: Centaurea × druentica, also known as mountain centaury, is a rare hybrid plant that is a cross between Centaurea montana and Centaurea scabiosa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are effective in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Centaurea × druentica typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
